content.problemStatement:
You had an array AAA of size NNN, and a cost array CCC of size NNN.

You will do exactly NNN operations of the following type:


Choose iii such that 1‚Č§i‚Č§‚ą£A‚ą£1 \le i \le |A|1‚Č§i‚Č§‚ą£A‚ą£, and then delete AiA_iAi‚Äč from the array AAA.
The associated cost of this operation is Ai√óCiA_i \times C_iAi‚Äč√óCi‚Äč.
After each operation, the remaining parts of AAA are concatenated and re-indexed from 111 to ‚ą£A‚ą£|A|‚ą£A‚ą£.
Note that the array CCC is not modified.

Find the minimum total cost needed to perform the NNN operations, thus deleting AAA.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN - the size of the arrays.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,A3,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, A_3, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,A3‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
The third line contains NNN integers - C1,C2,C3,‚Ä¶,CNC_1, C_2, C_3, \ldots, C_NC1‚Äč,C2‚Äč,C3‚Äč,‚Ä¶,CN‚Äč.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the minimum cost to delete the array AAA.
